text: I was charged $49.99 twice this billing cycle. Please investigate and issue a refund.
My subscription was cancelled without consent and I was charged a termination fee.
I cannot find my invoice from last month. I need it for reimbursement.
What payment methods do you accept? I want to switch to PayPal.
Does the annual plan include a discount compared to monthly billing?
The API returns 500 errors on all POST requests since the update this morning. Production down.
Data export is broken — the CSV file is empty despite having 10,000 records.
The mobile app crashes on iOS 17 when uploading files larger than 10MB.
Search results take 30 seconds to load. It used to respond in under 1 second.
Dark mode setting does not persist between app sessions.
My account was compromised. I see login attempts from Russia. Please lock it immediately.
All my project data was deleted after upgrading my plan. I need it restored urgently.
I cannot change my email address. The verification email never arrives.
How do I add a team member to my organization? The invite button is grayed out.
I would like to update my display name and profile picture.
Order #78234 was marked as delivered but I never received it. It contained expensive hardware.
Wrong item delivered: I ordered a laptop stand but received a mouse pad.
My package has been stuck in transit for two weeks with no tracking updates.
I need to change the delivery address. The order has not shipped yet.
Can I upgrade my shipping to express? I placed the order two hours ago.
